ai_coding_agent.Runs an AI coding harness inside a Docke: Runs an AI coding harness inside a Docker sandbox to perform coding tasks against a workspace.
ai_coding_agent.Coding task to give to the sandboxed age: Coding task to give to the sandboxed agent.
ai_coding_agent.Where the sandbox workspace source shoul: Where the sandbox workspace source should come from.
ai_coding_agent.GitHub owner/repo, GitHub URL, or Git UR: GitHub owner/repo, GitHub URL, or Git URL depending on the selected source type.
ai_coding_agent.Branch, tag, or commit to check out. Def: Branch, tag, or commit to check out. Defaults to the repository's default branch.
ai_coding_agent.Git clone depth. Use 1 for a shallow clo: Git clone depth. Use 1 for a shallow clone or full for complete history.
ai_coding_agent.Harness session ID to resume. Defaults t: Harness session ID to resume. Defaults to the session persisted in thread-scoped memory by the previous run in this conversation.
ai_coding_agent.System prompt that sets the coding agent: System prompt that sets the coding agent's persona and behavior.
ai_coding_agent.Coding agent harness to run inside the s: Coding agent harness to run inside the sandbox.
ai_coding_agent.Harness-specific model identifier. Set a: Harness-specific model identifier. Set a model that matches the selected harness.
ai_coding_agent.Credential injected into the sandbox env: Credential injected into the sandbox environment for the selected coding harness.
ai_coding_agent.Environment variable name used for the r: Environment variable name used for the resolved agent credential. Defaults depend on the selected harness.
ai_coding_agent.Token credential injected into the sandb: Token credential injected into the sandbox to authenticate HTTPS git clone and push against the repository host (GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, or self-hosted). Also read by the GitHub CLI to open pull requests when the host is GitHub.
ai_coding_agent.Environment variable name for the resolv: Environment variable name for the resolved git token. The git credential helper reads it at push time, and the GitHub CLI reads GH_TOKEN by default.
ai_coding_agent.Username paired with the token for HTTPS: Username paired with the token for HTTPS git clone and push. Defaults to x-access-token (GitHub / GitHub App tokens). Use oauth2 for GitLab OAuth tokens or x-token-auth for Bitbucket access tokens.
ai_coding_agent.Git author name configured in the sandbo: Git author name configured in the sandbox for commits made by the agent. Applied only when a git credential is provided.
ai_coding_agent.Git author email configured in the sandb: Git author email configured in the sandbox for commits made by the agent. Applied only when a git credential is provided.
ai_coding_agent.Install the GitHub CLI (gh) during boots: Install the GitHub CLI (gh) during bootstrap so the agent can open pull requests. Requires curl and tar in the Docker image.
ai_coding_agent.Docker image used for the sandbox. Defau: Docker image used for the sandbox. Defaults to a Node image with the selected harness CLI installed automatically; override it to bring your own toolchain.
ai_coding_agent.Working directory inside the sandbox con: Working directory inside the sandbox container.
ai_coding_agent.Package manager hint used while bootstra: Package manager hint used while bootstrapping the workspace.
ai_coding_agent.Commands run while bootstrapping the wor: Commands run while bootstrapping the workspace before the agent starts, and re-run for every run that reuses the sandbox. Empty by default; for example, add npm install to preinstall an existing project. Leave empty when the agent scaffolds or installs dependencies itself.
ai_coding_agent.Named workspace scripts surfaced to the: Named workspace scripts surfaced to the agent and sandbox policy.
ai_coding_agent.Optional AGENTS.md-style instructions pr: Optional AGENTS.md-style instructions projected into the sandbox workspace.
ai_coding_agent.Optional executable name or path for the: Optional executable name or path for the selected harness inside the sandbox.
ai_coding_agent.Port used by the OpenCode in-sandbox ser: Port used by the OpenCode in-sandbox server. It is automatically published for OpenCode runs.
ai_coding_agent.Additional container ports to publish to: Additional container ports to publish to the host for preview or harness access.
ai_coding_agent.per_thread reuses one sandbox for the wh: per_thread reuses one sandbox for the whole conversation thread (torn down on thread close, idle timeout, or shutdown); per_run creates a fresh sandbox destroyed after each run. Falls back to per_run when no thread is available.
ai_coding_agent.When to snapshot the sandbox if the prov: When to snapshot the sandbox if the provider supports it.
ai_coding_agent.Idle window before an unused per_thread: Idle window before an unused per_thread sandbox is torn down, such as 30m or 2h.
ai_coding_agent.Slug of the thread-scoped memory definit: Slug of the thread-scoped memory definition used to persist and resume the harness session ID across runs. The definition must be attached to the workflow.
ai_coding_agent.Policy decision for commands and capabil: Policy decision for commands and capabilities not matched.
ai_coding_agent.Command patterns the sandbox policy allo: Command patterns the sandbox policy allows outright.
ai_coding_agent.Command patterns requiring approval. Una: Command patterns requiring approval. Unattended workflows should avoid ask rules.
ai_coding_agent.Command patterns the sandbox policy bloc: Command patterns the sandbox policy blocks.
ai_coding_agent.Policy decision for outbound network acc: Policy decision for outbound network access.
ai_coding_agent.Whether the sandbox should emit file eve: Whether the sandbox should emit file events.
ai_coding_agent.Whether the sandbox should emit per-file: Whether the sandbox should emit per-file diff events.
ai_coding_agent.Whether to include a compact sanitized e: Whether to include a compact sanitized event trace in the action output.
ai_coding_agent.Maximum number of compact events to incl: Maximum number of compact events to include in the output.
ai_coding_agent.Maximum number of text characters return: Maximum number of text characters returned in the output.
ai_coding_agent.Maximum number of diff characters return: Maximum number of diff characters returned per file.
ai_coding_agent.Whether the agent run completed without: Whether the agent run completed without a run error event.
ai_coding_agent.High-level plan emitted by the agent in: High-level plan emitted by the agent in a hexabot-state block, when present.
ai_coding_agent.Structured todo list emitted by the agen: Structured todo list emitted by the agent in a hexabot-state block, e.g. one entry per component. A workflow loop can iterate these.
ai_coding_agent.Send a direct coding prompt, or build th: Send a direct coding prompt, or build the task from recent conversation history (requires a conversational thread).
ai_coding_agent.Number of most recent conversation messa: Number of most recent conversation messages to build the coding task from instead of a prompt.
ai_coding_agent.How the action handles the structured pl: How the action handles the structured plan/todos contract. "off" neither requests nor requires a plan; "optional" injects the plan contract into the system prompt and reports plan_status; "required" additionally fails the run when no valid plan is emitted, so a workflow can branch on it deterministically.
ai_coding_agent.Whether the agent emitted a valid struct: Whether the agent emitted a valid structured plan: "ok" (parsed), "invalid" (a hexabot-state block was present but malformed), or "absent" (no block). Lets a workflow branch on planning compliance deterministically instead of inferring it from an empty plan.
ai_coding_agent.Reason the structured plan could not be: Reason the structured plan could not be parsed, when plan_status is "invalid" (or when plan_mode is "required" and no plan was emitted).
